text: Aaj nanad ke rishtey wale aaye aur unhone mere working status ko lekar taana maara, jiske baad Saas ne sabke samne meri tulna Sharma ji ki bahu se karke mujhe nicha dikhaya. Mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona aa raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha ki kal ki office presentation kaise taiyar karun. Itni ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki lag raha hai saans hi ruk jayegi, kaam toh bahut door ki baat hai.

Rishta party ke mana karne ke baad Saas ne chillana shuru kar diya ki meri 'modern' lifestyle ki wajah se nanad ka ghar nahi bas raha aur parivaar ki izzat mitti mein mil gayi. Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas laptop ke samne baith kar sisak rahi hoon, dimaag mein itna shor hai ki kuch sujhayi nahi de raha. Bas lag raha hai ki sab meri hi galti hai aur main is ghar ke liye ek manhoos bojh hoon.

Aaj ki rejection ke baad Saas ne phir wahi comparison shuru kar diya ki padosi ki bahu ne career chhod kar ghar sambhala isliye unka rishta turant ho gaya. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai aur flood of emotions ki wajah se main unhe ye bhi nahi bol pa rahi ki mera promotion hone wala hai. Bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai, aage ka plan kya hoga ye toh dimaag mein aa hi nahi raha.

Rishtey walo ne mere 'office timings' par sawal uthaye aur Saas ne unke samne hi mujhe nakara bol diya, ab mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Bas ek ajeeb sa andhera lag raha hai aur rone ke alawa kuch karne ki himmat nahi hai. Itne saare emotions ek saath aa rahe hain ki main bacchon ki homework ya kal ki client call ke baare mein bilkul blank hoon.

Rishta party ne jabse mana kiya hai, ghar mein kalesh shuru ho gaya hai aur Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'log kya kahenge' ki ghar ki bahu hi dhang ki nahi hai. Main itni zyada overwhelm ho gayi hoon ki bas rona nikal raha hai aur lag raha hai ki meri mehnat ka koi mol nahi hai. Solution kya hoga ye toh chhodo, mujhe toh bas is waqt rone ke liye ek kona chahiye jahan koi mujhe Sharma ji ki bahu ka waasta na de.
